title: Raymond Kimbell Playground - Parks - Yelp
content: There are many tables and chairs. Good for parents to sit and watch the children. The restroom should be serviced. Good experience.

title: Raymond Kimbell Playground - All You SHOULD Know Before ...
content: Cute little park. Took my daughter here for about a half hour. It would be for ages up to around 10 or so.

title: Raymond Kimbell Playground - San Francisco, California

title: Raymond Kimbell Playground - San Francisco Recreation and Parks
content: The park offers a clubhouse, children's play area, three baseball fields with bleacher seating, and open green areas for visitors.
